compiled_state.title: No make test-e2e target — validate.sh --ci reports E2E failure for projects without E2E tests
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 0 (BASIC). validate.sh --ci runs make test-e2e without checking if the target exists first.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Classification revised: behavioral, Score: 3 (INTERMEDIATE). Previous BASIC attempt failed — the fix required understanding validate.sh's CHECK_CI gating, APP_DIR cd timing, parallel subshell context, and test environment requirements. Escalating.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
